title: spec_driven_verify_v2
description: spec_driven_v2 Node2 slot-verification output. Identifiers only (address-not-content): which retrieved chunks are necessary to answer this slot, and which need a multi-hop external-document search. Both lists must be a subset of the chunk ids shown in the prompt.

rationale.description: 1-2 sentence reasoning written *before* the id lists (decoded first → leading CoT): which chunks carry on-point evidence for this slot's facet and which cite an external document that must be searched.

necessary_chunk_ids.description: Chunk ids needed to answer the question for this slot. Selective — drop off-topic/redundant/noise chunks. May be empty if none help.

multihop_chunk_ids.description: Subset of retrieved chunks that point to an external document which must itself be searched (multi-hop). May be empty.
